docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SHANE, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT THEISS, JUSTIN DEAN BROSEY, ERIN ANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $110.00 SERVED JAN-20-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THEISS, JUSTIN DEAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $110.00 SERVED JAN-20-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROSEY, ERIN ANNE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF STEPHEN SHANE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JUSTIN DEAN THEISS AND ERIN ANN BROSEY ARE BOTH PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHANE, STEPHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THEISS, JUSTIN DEAN BROSEY, ERIN ANNE DEFENSE PREVAILS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
